caption: Tonight the office felt different, heavy with anticipation and the scent of old books. He slid closer, his voice a low rumble against my ear as I adjusted the tie of my blazer. "You're sharper than the textbooks suggest," he whispered, fingers grazing the fabric tight around my waist. I smiled, knowing exactly what lay beneath the tailored skirt, hidden but felt. #UnivLife #ProfessorVibes #LateNightStudy #Curves #AllergicToBoring #HotLectures 🔥📚
